calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company.
Zalka Ancely, owner of the subject premises, and Melissa Johnson, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Joel Koressel.
Default was entered against defendant on June 3, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Joel Koressel as follows:

Damages/Principal - $387,862.82.
Prejudgment Interest - $35,481.48.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $453.00.

Total - $423,797.30.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-26-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Off Calendar
